project_type: C++20 Enterprise Cybersecurity Desktop Platform (30+ modules, Qt6 QML UI)
build_system: CMake 3.22 with custom cmake/ modules (Dependencies.cmake, QtHelpers.cmake, CompilerOptions.cmake, Version.cmake). Uses INTERFACE libraries for header-only deps. GCC 11.5 available.
test_framework: doctest (header-only, vendored in third_party/doctest). Single test executable 'threatone_tests' with all test files compiled together. test_main.cpp defines DOCTEST_CONFIG_IMPLEMENT_WITH_MAIN.
verification_instructions: 1) cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF 2) cmake --build build -j$(nproc) 3) cd build && ctest --output-on-failure. All 1053 tests must pass.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - all dependencies vendored in third_party/
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install Qt6, OpenSSL, YARA, libsodium, zstd, or any external packages. All new code using external libs must be behind CMake options (ENABLE_OPENSSL, ENABLE_YARA, etc.) with graceful fallback so the default ENABLE_QT=OFF build still compiles and passes all tests.
contribution_requirements: C++20, production-quality. New features behind CMake options defaulting OFF. Existing 1053 tests must keep passing.
key_patterns:
- Namespace: ThreatOne::<Module> (e.g. ThreatOne::Scanner, ThreatOne::Core)
- Error handling: Core::Result<T, Core::Error> with ::ok() and ::err() factory methods
- Logging: Core::ModuleLogger from Core::Logger::instance().getModuleLogger(name)
- ViewModels: #ifdef ENABLE_QT_BUILD for QObject version, plain C++ otherwise
- CMake targets: threatone_<module> STATIC libraries
- Header location: src/<module>/include/<module>/*.h
- Source location: src/<module>/src/*.cpp
- Tests location: tests/<module>/test_*.cpp
directory_structure:
Root: CMakeLists.txt, cmake/, src/, tests/, qml/, third_party/, docs/
src/: 29 module subdirs each with CMakeLists.txt, include/<mod>/, src/
tests/: test_main.cpp + per-module test dirs
qml/: main.qml, components/, pages/, themes/, widgets/
third_party/: spdlog, nlohmann, doctest, sqlite (all vendored)
cmake/: CompilerOptions.cmake, Dependencies.cmake, QtHelpers.cmake, Version.cmake
